prompt: Setting up navigation in nornspun-client. Two screens: Home and WorkoutDetail(workoutId: Long). I want type-safe routes and the back stack to survive process death. What's the right Nav 3 setup?

assertions.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
